title: pseudoliparis moluccana
intro: Pseudoliparis moluccana is a type of flowering plant commonly known as Moluccan liparis, a type of orchid native to the Moluccas islands in Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antidote for certain poisonings. Pseudoliparis moluccana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures, and its roots are sometimes dried and used as a powder or extract for medicinal purposes.
